abilities.name: 주눅
abilities.description: 주눅이 들어 스피드가 올라가는 타입이 있다.

flavorTexts.text: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.
It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.
